root.name: Slide numbering is added to the bottom right of all slides
root.description: Evaluates whether slide numbers are added to every slide and positioned at the bottom right, with no extraneous or incorrect modifications.

children.name: All slides in the modified PPT have slide numbers present
children.description: Checks that every slide contains a visible and correct slide number element.

children.name: Slide number is correctly positioned at the bottom right of each slide
children.description: Checks that the slide number appears at the correct bottom right location for every slide.

children.name: No extraneous or unintended modifications
children.description: Checks that only slide numbers were added and no other changes (e.g., animations, transitions, elements, or slide modifications unrelated to slide numbering) were made.

metadata.task: Add slide numbering at the bottom right corner of all slides
